subcodes.first_line: I recognize, O my God, that whenever something is related to Thee, the decree of the Will is applicable to it, and whenever it is related to itself, the decree of Purpose is established in it
subcodes.first_line_orig: وانی لاعلم یا الهی ان الشیئی لما ینسب الیک یظهر حکم المشیة فی صقعه و اذا ینسب
subcodes.subjects: @seven stages of creation, @four elements, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar]
